scope: Static decorator inventory for app.py and routes_jobs.py in staged workspace
auth_model: Global Flask before_request guard; exact endpoint/method public allowlist; owner/admin shared token or basic password for all protected routes.
limitations: Static inventory does not prove object-level authorization or every helper called by a route.
rate_limit_required is a review classification; rate limiting is not yet implemented.
registered routes created dynamically outside decorators would require runtime introspection; none were found in the reviewed files.

routes.purpose: Let direct browser loads of React routes resolve to the SPA entrypoint.
